description_long: This is a quaint, narrow bakery building with a steeply sloped red shingle roof and weathered wooden exterior walls. The lower portion of the structure is constructed from stone and brick, giving it a sturdy, rustic appearance. A striped pink-and-white awning shades the front entrance, which is flanked by a few stacked crates and a small patch of grass. A large wooden sign with visible text hangs on one side, and a green picket fence partially encloses the rear and side yard. The building features a prominent chimney, a downspout, and several small windows, some with shutters. The overall look is whimsical and storybook-like, suggesting a cozy, old-world bakery nestled in a village setting.
description: A whimsical, narrow bakery with a steep red shingle roof, weathered wood walls, striped awning, and rustic stone base. Features include a large wooden sign, green picket fence, and stacked crates.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the striped awning, main entrance, stacked crates, and chimney.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the tall wooden wall, small window, green picket fence, and utility box.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the large wooden sign, more of the picket fence, and the awning from the side.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the roof, chimney, awning, crates, and the bakery sign.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large, rustic wooden sign is mounted on the right side of the building, featuring engraved or painted text. The sign is rectangular with rounded edges, made of dark wood, and is attached with visible metal brackets. The text appears to be in a decorative, hand-painted style, but the exact wording is not fully legible from the images.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A pink-and-white striped fabric awning is present above the main entrance. The awning is curved and extends outward, providing shade. There is no visible bakery branding, logos, or text on the awning.
attribute_architectural_style: Rustic, storybook cottage style with steeply pitched roof, exposed wooden beams, and a mix of stone, brick, and wood materials.
